raw_consumer_statement: I booked a hotel room for 1 night for a charge of {$420.00} ( including all taxes and fees ). The hotel charged me {$580.00}. I noticed right away and went to the front desk where I was informed the manager would need to fix it and he was out. They gave me his card and told me to email him. I never received a response from the manager so I disputed the charge with the credit card company. I faxed and mailed them receipts showing I booked for a total of {$420.00} and of course they could see I was charged {$580.00}. After over a month they informed me they were siding with the merchant and I was to pay the {$580.00}.
